text:
There once was a bird. Every morning she would wake up and decide what she wanted to do. Maybe she wanted to fly south. Maybe she wanted to visit some frogs. Or maybe she wanted just to enjoy her own beautiful bird feeder.

So off she would go. Sometimes she would soar high. Sometimes she would dip gracefully. Whenever she flew past her favorite branch, she would poke it lovingly. That branch loved her.

They would talk sometimes.

Sometimes just the bird.

And sometimes just the branch.

Or sometimes the whole thing.

Oh, didn't anyone just love birds?

They loved the bird.

And the bird loved them.

What a pair.

One day Bird decided she wanted to explore further north. That would mean going through a big forest full of strange, shiny forest animals. That would mean leaving her favorite branch.

Was she scared?

Oh no. Birds love forests.

They just love them.

There were all sorts of animals there.

Some were scary

Some were cute

All
